definition.procedurexml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="event_trigger" deletable="false" x="40" y="40"><field name="trigger">player_ticks</field><next><block type="controls_if"><value name="IF0"><block type="math_binary_ops"><field name="OP">GT</field><value name="A"><block type="math_java_constants"><field name="CONSTANT">RANDOM</field></block></value><value name="B"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">0.99999</field></block></value></block></value><statement name="DO0"><block type="java_code"><field name="CODE">net.minecraft.client.Minecraft mc = net.minecraft.client.Minecraft.getInstance();&#10;&#10;mc.execute(() -> {&#10;    net.minecraft.client.Screenshot.grab(&#10;        mc.gameDirectory,&#10;        mc.getMainRenderTarget(),&#10;        component -> {&#10;            try {&#10;                java.io.File screenshotFolder = new java.io.File(mc.gameDirectory, "screenshots");&#10;&#10;                java.io.File newest = java.util.Arrays.stream(screenshotFolder.listFiles((dir, name) -> name.endsWith(".png")))&#10;                        .max(java.util.Comparator.comparingLong(java.io.File::lastModified))&#10;                        .orElse(null);&#10;&#10;                if (newest != null) {&#10;                    java.io.File renamed = new java.io.File(screenshotFolder, "iminyoursystemnow.png");&#10;&#10;                    // Delete old file if it already exists&#10;                    if (renamed.exists())&#10;                        renamed.delete();&#10;&#10;                    newest.renameTo(renamed);&#10;                }&#10;&#10;            } catch (Exception e) {&#10;                e.printStackTrace();&#10;            }&#10;        }&#10;    );&#10;});</field></block></statement></block></next></block><block type="custom_dependency_entity" x="525" y="292"><field name="NAME">player</field></block><block type="math_dual_ops" x="-57" y="446"><field name="OP">ADD</field></block></xml>
